narrative:

At this World Cup, Cucurella demonstrates significant attacking prowess, registering 0.4 assists per 90 minutes and 1.0 key passes per 90 minutes. His expected assists per 90 minutes stands at 0.217, confirming his creative contribution from the left flank. Defensively, he averages 0.4 tackles per 90 minutes and 1.4 clearances per 90 minutes, indicating a balanced role.

Cucurella acts as a vital attacking outlet for Spain, consistently providing service from wide areas. Scouts and fans should watch for his continued ability to create chances, given his high assists per 90 minutes. His defensive work, including his 0.8 interceptions per 90 minutes, will be crucial as the tournament progresses.
